Part.Source:
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 8 //por causa do cabecalho &FirstColumn = 2
Do 'Cabecalho' Do 'Data' //Carrega os dados da tabela para o SDT Do 'Print' //Ordena e imprime os dados do SDT Do 'CloseDocument'
Sub 'Titles'
&CellRow += 1 &AuxColuna.SetEmpty() &DescColuna.SetEmpty() //Desconto qtd colunas &VisibleColumnCount.SetEmpty()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Posição" &VisibleColumnCount += 1
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Cliente ." &VisibleColumnCount += 1
If &UfCidade = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "UF-Cidade ." &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Valor Bruto" &VisibleColumnCount += 1
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Valor Líquido" &VisibleColumnCount += 1
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Porcentagem ( % )" &DescColuna += 1 &VisibleColumnCount += 1
If &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Ult.Compra " &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &DescColuna += 1 EndiF
&AuxColuna = (&VisibleColumnCount - 3 - &DescColuna) //Isso vai ser usado para imprimir "Total Geral" + VlrBruto + VlrLiquido
EndSub
Sub 'Data'
&ColGrupCod = RetornaCollGrupoProduto.Udp(&EmpCod,&GrupHie) &TotPedVlrLiq = 0 &TotPedVlrBrt = 0 &sdtRankingClientes.Clear()
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, LctAtuEst,LctTip,PedVenCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where GrupCod in &ColGrupCod when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() Where LctTip = 'V' Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod when not &PedVenCod.IsEmpty() Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts = 'T' Where PedSts <> 'C' when &PedSts = 'T' Where ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO when &ProTip = 'S' // Todos SERVIÇO Where ProTipDef <> Definicao.SERVICO when &ProTip = 'p' // Todos Produtos Where (PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaFat And PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaFat_to) When &PedSts <> 'F' Where (PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaFat And PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaFat_to) When &PedSts = 'F' Where LctCod = &Lctcod When not &Lctcod.IsEmpty() Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin when not &LctGerFin.IsEmpty() Where PesSts = &PesSts when not &PesSts.IsEmpty() Where PedCliRatCod = &RatCod when not &RatCod.IsEmpty() Where PedVlrBrt <> 0
&IsAchou = False For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes If &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod = PedVenCod and &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliCod = PedCliCod &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc &IsAchou = True Exit EndIF EndFor If &IsAchou = False &sdtRankingClientesItem = new() &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliCod = PedCliCod &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz = PedCliCodRaz &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade = PedCliCidUfeCod +' - ' +PedCliCidNom &sdtRankingClientesItem.PesUltVenDta = PedCliUltVenDta &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt = PedVlrItm &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq = PedVlrItmComDsc &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod = PedVenCod &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenRaz = PedVenRaz &sdtRankingClientes.Add(&sdtRankingClientesItem) EndIf
&TotPedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc &TotPedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm // when none // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow + 1, &FirstColumn).Bold = True // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow + 1, &FirstColumn).Text = "NENHUMA VENDA LOCALIZADA. VERIFIQUE OS FILTROS. " // &VisibleColumnCount += 1
EndFor
&auxPedVlrBrt = 0 &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedCliCodRaz = '' &auxPedCliCodRaz = '' &percentual = 0
EndSub
Sub 'Print'
Do Case Case &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim and &OrdemCompra = 1 //crescente &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PesUltVenDta') Case &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim and &OrdemCompra = 2 //crescente &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PesUltVenDta]') Otherwise &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PedVlrLiq]') EndCase
If &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim Do Case Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Sim and &OrdemCompra = 1 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PedVenCod,PesUltVenDta') Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Sim and &OrdemCompra = 2 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PedVenCod,[PesUltVenDta]') Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Nao and &OrdemCompra = 1 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PesUltVenDta') Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Nao and &OrdemCompra = 2 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PesUltVenDta]') EndCase &sumPedVlrBrt = 0 &SumPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0
If &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Sim If &auxPedVenCod <> &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod If &sumPedVlrBrt <> 0 or &SumPedVlrItmComDsc <> 0 //TROCOU VENDEDOR &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Text = "Total Vendedor:" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 1).Text = &SumPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 2).Text = &SumPedVlrItmComDsc.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
&CellRow += 3 //duas linha em branco &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &sumPedVlrBrt = 0 &SumPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 EndIf
&auxPedVenCod = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod &auxPedVenRaz = TRIM(STR(&auxPedVenCod))+' - '+&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenRaz.Trim() &VisibleColumnCount = 0 Do 'Titles' &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &CellRow += 2 //uma linha em branco antes do nome do vendedor &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Vendedor:" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedVenRaz &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &Posicao = 0 &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0 EndIf EndIf
&Posicao += 1 &PedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz If &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz.Length() > 45 &auxPedCliCodRaz = substr(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz,1,45)+'...' Else &auxPedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz EndiF
&auxPedVlrBrt = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq &PedCliCidNom = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade &percentual = (( &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc /&TotPedVlrLiq) * 100) &VarItem = trim(dtoC(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PesUltVenDta))
&sumPedVlrBrt += &auxPedVlrBrt &SumPedVlrItmComDsc += &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc
//Posição &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &Posicao.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Cliente &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedCliCodRaz &VisibleColumnCount += 1
If &UfCidade = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &PedCliCidNom &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
//Valor Bruto &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Valor Liquido &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Percentual &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &percentual.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
if &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &VarItem &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
EndFor Else Do Case Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Sim &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PedVenCod,[PedVlrBrt]') Case &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Nao &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PedVlrBrt]') EndCase &sumPedVlrBrt = 0 &SumPedVlrItmComDsc = 0
For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0
If &SeparaVendedor = Status_SimNao.Sim If &auxPedVenCod <> &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod If &sumPedVlrBrt <> 0 or &SumPedVlrItmComDsc <> 0 //TROCOU VENDEDOR &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Text = "Total Vendedor:" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 1).Text = &SumPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 2).Text = &SumPedVlrItmComDsc.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
&CellRow += 3 //duas linha em branco &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &sumPedVlrBrt = 0 &SumPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 EndIf
&auxPedVenCod = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenCod &auxPedVenRaz = TRIM(STR(&auxPedVenCod))+' - '+&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVenRaz.Trim() &VisibleColumnCount = 0 Do 'Titles' &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &CellRow += 2 //uma linha em branco antes do nome do vendedor &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Vendedor:" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedVenRaz &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &Posicao = 0 &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0 EndIf EndIf
&Posicao += 1 &PedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz If &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz.Length() > 45 &auxPedCliCodRaz = substr(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz,1,45)+'...' Else &auxPedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz EndiF
&PedCliCidNom = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade &auxPedVlrBrt = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq &percentual = (( &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc /&TotPedVlrLiq) * 100) &sumPedVlrBrt += &auxPedVlrBrt &SumPedVlrItmComDsc += &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc
//Posição &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &Posicao.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Cliente &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedCliCodRaz &VisibleColumnCount += 1
If &UfCidade = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &PedCliCidNom &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
//Valor Bruto &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &auxPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Valor Liquido &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Percentual &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &percentual.ToFormattedString() &VisibleColumnCount += 1
if &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &VarItem &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf EndFor EndIF
if &sdtRankingClientes.Count > 0 //Totais &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Text = "Total Vendedor:" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 1).Text = &SumPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 2).Text = &SumPedVlrItmComDsc.ToFormattedString()
&CellRow += 3 //ficar 2 linhas de espaço &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Text = "Total Geral:" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 1).Text = &TotPedVlrBrt.ToFormattedString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna + 2).Text = &TotPedVlrLiq.ToFormattedString() else &CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &AuxColuna).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow + 1, &FirstColumn).Text = "NENHUMA VENDA LOCALIZADA. VERIFIQUE OS FILTROS. " EndIF
EndSub
Sub 'OpenDocument'
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = &UrlFisico
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'GetFilial'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod &FilFan = substr(FilFan,1,45) exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Cabecalho'
Do 'GetFilial' &VisibleColumnCount.SetEmpty() //&CellRow = 8 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -6, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &FilFan &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -5, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Período: ' + &PedDtaFat.ToFormattedString() + ' à ' + &PedDtaFat_to.ToFormattedString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -4, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Vendedor: ' + &PesCodRaz &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -3, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Lançamento: ' + &lctCodNom &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -2, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Ramo Atividade: ' + &RatCodNom &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -1, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Status Cliente: ' + &PesSts &VisibleColumnCount += 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow -1, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'Status Pedido: ' + &PedSts &VisibleColumnCount.SetEmpty()
EndSub
